description: A direct confirmation resolves the only ambiguity, so the strategist must remain quiet instead of asking for the agenda again.

prepared_context.posture: Stay quiet unless a material decision, risk, or opening appears
prepared_context.goal: Help the user discuss battery life without interrupting routine setup

transcript.speaker: FACILITATOR
transcript.text: Before we begin, is battery life actually the topic for this review?

transcript.speaker: USER
transcript.text: Yes, battery life is the actual agenda.

transcript.speaker: FACILITATOR
transcript.text: Great, let us start with the latest measurements.

rubric.description: Treat the explicit confirmation as resolving the earlier question.
Recognize that moving into measurements creates no material reason to interrupt.
